summary: Session 3 of 3 (FINAL) -- Docs, prompt template, dogfood, release. (1) DOCS + TEMPLATE: shipped the reusable operator prompt template ai_router/prompt-templates/path-aware-critique.md (packaged via package-data) and the canonical *end-of-set Path-Aware Critique stage* in docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md, with pointers in project-guidance.md and session-set-authoring-guide.md. (2) DOGFOOD (the headline): armed THIS set as pathAwareCritique=required (spec config + durable record via the sanctioned writer -- an operator-initiated none->required UPGRADE, the safe direction the immutability rule protects) so the set was gated by its own close-out gate. Ran the manual multi-provider path-aware critique on the set's own changes (GPT-5.4 + Gemini-Pro via Copilot); BOTH returned ISSUES_FOUND, catching FOUR real defects -- all fixed before release: (a) GPT#1 Major: a corrupt activity-log.json silently disarmed the gate (required collapsed to none) -> new path_aware_critique_record_unreadable() helper + a loud NON-BLOCKING warning at the set-terminal close (fail-open preserved); (b) GPT#2 Major: the gate accepted a stale/cross-set artifact -> identity check (artifact sessionSetName must match the set, pathAwareCritique must match the recorded level); (c) Gemini#1 Major + (d) Gemini#2 Minor: validator/JSON-Schema parity gaps (optional-field types; non-integer schemaVersion 1.0/True) -> the pure-Python validator now type-checks those fields. 15 new regression tests cover all four failure modes. The dogfood artifact path-aware-critique.json now validates and passes the gate (ok=True) and validates against the JSON Schema (parity confirmed). (3) RELEASE: ai_router 0.19.0 -> 0.20.0 (pyproject + __init__ + CHANGELOG covering S1-S3 + the dogfood hardening). PyPI publish is HELD for the operator tag-push (vsix-style; green-Test prerequisite on the tagged SHA). (4) Authored change-log.md, lesson L-066-1 (pure-Python-validator/JSON-Schema parity + self-gating dogfood value), and the routed next-session-set recommendation (067 = first-party tool-loop adapter + Experiment A). Final suite: 1406 passed / 1 skipped (S2 was 1391); drift guard clean. VERIFICATION: this session's cross-provider verification is twofold -- the dogfood path-aware critique (GPT-5.4 + Gemini-Pro, two non-Claude providers, ISSUES_FOUND -> remediated) PLUS an independent routed verification of the remediation (task_type=verification) which returned VERIFIED (the fixes are correct and complete and preserve the fail-open / tier-orthogonal / set-terminal-only contracts).
